caption.caption: During a traditional Korean festival, performers balance on a large, wooden see-saw-like structure while a crowd cheers below.

level2.caption: Performers balance on a large wooden structure as a crowd looks on during a festival.

level3.caption: During a Korean festival, performers skillfully balance on a towering wooden structure while a large crowd observes the game.

level4.caption: During the Andong Chajeon Nori festival in Korea, performers demonstrate skill and balance atop a towering wooden horse structure as a large crowd observes the traditional game.

level1.caption: A modern, brightly colored Buddhist monk's robe demonstrates a contemporary adaptation of traditional Korean ritual garments.

caption.caption: A group of people enjoy a breezy day flying colorful, bird-shaped kites in a field.

level2.caption: A group of people are enjoying a day outdoors flying kites in a field.

level3.caption: A group of people are enjoying a traditional outdoor game in a field in Korea.

level4.caption: A group of people in Korea participate in Yeonnalligi, a traditional kite-flying game historically played during the Lunar New Year to shake off bad luck and wish for good fortune.

level1.caption: A modern, brightly colored Buddhist monk's robe demonstrates a contemporary adaptation of traditional Korean ritual garments.

caption.caption: A vibrant group of performers in traditional attire dance and play instruments on a grassy field in front of a stadium.

level2.caption: A large group of people are performing a lively dance with instruments on a field in front of a stadium.

level3.caption: A lively performance takes place on a field in Korea as part of a traditional game.

level4.caption: A vibrant performance of Gwacheon Mudong Dapgyo Nori, a traditional Korean game, unfolds on a field with performers in colorful attire engaging in a lively ritual.

level1.caption: A modern, brightly colored Buddhist monk's robe demonstrates a contemporary adaptation of traditional Korean ritual garments.
